block.fluidlogistics.fluid_transporter.t: _Transfer_ fluid from one container to another according to the configured _filter_
block.fluidlogistics.multi_fluid_tank.to: _A mysterious artifact from a seafaring engineer_
Can store up to _8 different types_ of fluids simultaneously
block.fluidlogistics.horizontal_multi_fl: Can store up to _8 different types_ of fluids simultaneously
item.fluidlogistics.compressed_storage_t: Right-click on a fluid tank to _transfer fluid_ and _consume_ the compressed storage tank
item.fluidlogistics.portable_stock_ticke: Not linked to a logistics network
item.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.tooltip: A versatile tool for configuring interaction points on mechanical components
item.fluidlogistics.portable_stock_ticke: When sneak clicked on a Stock Link or Stock Ticker
Portable Stock Ticker will bind to the Network
Portable Stock Ticker will open a mobile Stock Keeper menu
item.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.tooltip: When Right-Clicking a Packager or Re-Packager
When Right-Clicking a Package Frogport, Postbox, Mechanical Arm, Weighted Ejector, or Display Board
Can _configure_ the _interaction point_ of the Package Frogport, Postbox, Mechanical Arm, Weighted Ejector, or Display Board
When Right-Clicking or Sneak + Right-Clicking a logistics-capable component
Can _configure_ that component's _logistics network_ or _authorize_ that _network_ to the Hand Pointer
Place in a crafting grid to reset
create.fluidlogistics.factory_panel.hold: Hold Alt to set the fluid contained in the item
create.fluidlogistics.scroll_precise_amo: Shift or Ctrl for Precise Amount
create.fluidlogistics.gauge.request_addi: Additional fluid to request while restocking
Do not request additional fluid while restocking
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.arm.s: Click interaction points to edit, click a selected Mechanical Arm to confirm
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.arm.p: %s interaction point(s) were out of range and skipped
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.depot: Click any block to choose the Weighted Ejector target, click the Weighted Ejector again to confirm
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.displ: Click a Display Link to bind it to this display target
Already connected to this display target
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.frogp: Click a chain to update, or right-click more Frogports to batch select
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.mailb: Click a Train Station to update the connection, or right-click more Postboxes to batch select
Cannot connect to the original Train Station
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.logis: Showing members of the current logistics network
Added to the current logistics network
Removed from the current logistics network
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.autho: Authorized that logistics network for this Hand Pointer
This Hand Pointer is already authorized for that logistics network
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.packa: This Packager has been restored to default
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.repac: This Re-Packager has been restored to default
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.addre: The package address is already empty
Cannot clear a package address set by a sign
create.fluidlogistics.clipboard.no_valid: No valid address found in the clipboard
create.fluidlogistics.clipboard.address_: This %s has its address set by a sign and cannot be modified
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.fluid: This Fluid Packager is now force-powered
This Fluid Packager has been restored to default
create.fluid_packager.no_portable_fluid_: Fluid Packagers cannot connect directly to Portable Fluid Interfaces
fluidlogistics.configuration.title: Fluid Package Configuration
fluidlogistics.configuration.fluidTransp: Whether the Fluid Transporter is enabled
fluidlogistics.configuration.basinCapaci: Increase Basin capacity by 10x; requires restarting the game to apply
fluidlogistics.configuration.compressedT: Maximum fluid amount the compressed storage tank can hold (in mB)
fluidlogistics.configuration.fluidPackag: Maximum fluid amount a fluid package can hold (in mB); the effective maximum is limited to 9x the current compressed tank capacity
fluidlogistics.ponder.fluid_packager.tex: Fluid Packagers can package fluids from tanks into fluid packages
Given redstone power, they will extract fluid from the tank and package it up
Fluid packages can be transported and processed like regular items
Inserting a fluid package will unpack it, filling the connected tank
Fluid Packagers will not accept fluid packages they cannot fully unpack
fluidlogistics.ponder.fluid_packager_add: When a sign is placed on a Fluid Packager...
Created fluid packages will carry the written lines of text as their address
Package filters route fluid packages based on their address
Mechanical Saws can unpack fluid packages directly into Compressed Storage Tanks
Besides filters, Package Frogports and Postboxes can also route fluid packages
Check their Ponder scenes to learn how they behave
advancement.fluidlogistics.let_me_point_: Use the Hand Pointer to enter configuration mode for the first time
